title: Finite Real Schur Decomposition Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite real-Schur bad superdiagonal QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact real-Schur replay reads T[0,1] as 2 while a malformed row claims 3, isolating a compact scalar equality conflict for the Farkas route.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional Schur rows only when they add distinct triangular coupling, block-Schur, eigenvalue-ordering, perturbation, residual-bound, or eigensolver pressure; keep Schur existence, QR-iteration convergence, perturbation theory, and floating-point stability in theorem or numerical-honesty lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode the fixed rational A, Q, Q^T, T, Schur vectors, diagonal values, trace, determinant, and product as deterministic exact-rational replay obligations.
Route the false superdiagonal row through a source-linked QF_LRA artifact and checked Farkas evidence after exact replay reads the conflicting triangular entry.
Expose the pack through the matrix computation learner and consumer query surfaces.

Keep real/complex Schur existence, eigenvalue ordering, multiplicity theory, QR-iteration convergence, perturbation theory, and floating-point stability claims marked Lean or numerical-honesty horizon.
